title: Race Deduplicator Input
description: Configuration for the race deduplication actor.

supabaseUrl.title: Supabase URL
supabaseUrl.description: The URL of your Supabase project (e.g. https://xyz.supabase.co).

supabaseServiceKey.title: Supabase Service Role Key
supabaseServiceKey.description: The service role key for your Supabase project.

similarityThreshold.title: Name Similarity Threshold
similarityThreshold.description: Minimum Levenshtein similarity (0–1) for two race names to be considered duplicates. Default 0.8.

dryRun.title: Dry Run
dryRun.description: When enabled, logs duplicates to the dataset but does not delete any records.
